channel.title: My Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent posts from My Tech Blog

item.title: The Whereby Meetings Manifesto: A Simple Framework for Better Meetings Every Time
item.description: Adopt the Whereby Meetings Manifesto to reclaim your focus time and make your team's meetings more efficient and purposeful.

item.title: Time to kill the '1 remote—all remote' rule!
item.description: Discover why the traditional hybrid meeting rule is failing and how to create a more equitable experience for both in-office and remote workers.
